description: Domain-level dependency graph for isomer-admin-topic-team-specialize. This manifest describes expected procedural step dependencies and recovery paths; it does not verify that workspace artifacts exist. Prepared-topic evidence from isomer-admin-topic-creator summaries and Topic Manager topology evidence can satisfy reusable topic prerequisites while team-specific steps still run through this graph.

requires: Concrete Research Topic or enough user-supplied topic substance to derive one.
Candidate Topic Workspace directory or enough context to derive a provisional seed.
produces: Provisional Topic Workspace seed when needed.
Next action for topic intent resolution.
recovery_conditions: Use as the first recoverable step when a later target lacks a topic workspace seed.
mutation_notes: May create a provisional topic workspace seed and source intent material only after topic substance and path safety are clear.
unrecoverable_blockers: Research Topic is missing or generic.
Derived or supplied Topic Workspace directory collides with unsafe Project material.

predecessors.condition: Topic workspace seed or candidate workspace is missing.

requires: Resolved Project context or equivalent evidence.
Research Topic candidate or user-provided topic prompt.
Candidate or registered Topic Workspace that can resolve topic.intent.overview.
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when the request contains enough topic substance to create topic.intent.overview.
mutation_notes: Writes or updates user-editable topic overview source intent.
unrecoverable_blockers: Topic substance is missing or too generic to status without guessing.

predecessors.condition: topic.intent.overview is missing.

recovery_conditions: Recoverable when topic intent can be resolved first.
mutation_notes: Updates topic.intent.overview directly from user clarification answers.
unrecoverable_blockers: Topic overview is absent and the original request lacks enough topic substance.

predecessors.condition: No candidate Topic Workspace exists.
No concrete topic overview or registered topic statement exists.
Topic statement is missing, generic, or unclear.

requires: topic.intent.overview, prepared-topic evidence, or explicit registered Research Topic ref with concrete topic statement.
produces: Reused common preparation refs when supplied
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when topic material and candidate Topic Workspace can be derived safely.
mutation_notes: May create Project Manifest-backed topic registration through supported Isomer CLI/API surfaces.
unrecoverable_blockers: Concrete topic statement is missing.
Topic Workspace path is unsafe or collides with another registration.
Required Pixi binding cannot be resolved through supported surfaces.

predecessors.condition: topic.intent.overview is missing.
Registration-dependent setup or service delegation will follow.

requires: Resolved Project and Topic Workspace context.
Enough topic material or prompt context to identify topic-level runnable needs.
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when topic intent exists and a runnable target is clear enough to express as source intent.
mutation_notes: Writes concise user-editable topic environment source intent.
unrecoverable_blockers: Runnable target is unclear.
Topic material is too vague to derive topic-level environment requirements.

predecessors.condition: Manifest-backed topic refs or Pixi binding evidence are missing.
topic.intent.topic_env_requirements is missing and a clear runnable target exists.

requires: topic.intent.topic_env_requirements, prepared topic environment evidence, explicit topic env target spec, or clear runnable target
produces: Topic Main Development Repository predecessor evidence
Preserved Topic Actor roster and Topic Actor Workspace refs when present
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when registration and topic env source intent can be prepared first.
mutation_notes: Delegates setup to isomer-srv-topic-env-setup; records classification-aware service output as durable predecessor evidence.
unrecoverable_blockers: Effective Topic Workspace Pixi binding is blocked.
Runnable target is unclear.
Host resource check blocks setup or verification classified as heavy or unknown-risk.

predecessors.condition: topic.intent.overview is missing.
Authoritative topic refs are missing.
Topic env predecessor work is in scope before team material is adapted.

requires: Prepared-topic evidence when available, including current Topic Actor roster and Topic Actor Workspace refs
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when topic intent, registration, and selected template can be resolved.
mutation_notes: Copies and edits only topic-local team material under the Topic Workspace.
unrecoverable_blockers: No Domain Agent Team Template can be selected or confirmed.
Registration remains blocked.

predecessors.condition: Specialization outputs are missing.

recovery_conditions: Recoverable when adaptation can run first.
mutation_notes: Updates copied topic-team material directly from user clarification answers.
unrecoverable_blockers: Missing team specialization cannot be produced because topic or template selection is blocked.

predecessors.condition: topic.intent.overview is missing.
Topic registration evidence is missing.
Topic env predecessor evidence is needed for cwd requirements.
Authoritative Agent Names or topic-team scope are needed.

requires: Topic env predecessor evidence when available
Authoritative Agent Names or explicit selected-agent subset
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when topic, registration, topic env evidence, and team scope can be prepared first.
mutation_notes: Writes concise user-editable per-Agent Workspace source intent.
unrecoverable_blockers: Agent Names are not authoritative and no explicit selected-agent subset is supplied.
Per-Agent Workspace cwd requirements are too vague.

predecessors.condition: Specialized topic-team shape or Agent Names are missing.
Registration evidence is missing.
Topic Workspace and Topic Main Development Repository predecessor evidence is missing.
topic.intent.agent_env_requirements is missing and cwd readiness proof is requested.

requires: Specialized topic-team shape and draft profile or packet/profile input summary
Topic Main Development Repository predecessor evidence
topic.intent.agent_env_requirements or explicit agent target spec or clear per-agent cwd readiness target
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when registration, topic env predecessor evidence, team scope, and source agent env intent can be prepared first.
mutation_notes: Delegates worktree creation and cwd verification to isomer-srv-agent-env-setup.
unrecoverable_blockers: Per-agent cwd target is unclear.
Topic Main Development Repository predecessor evidence is blocked.
Host resource check blocks per-agent verification classified as heavy or unknown-risk.

predecessors.condition: Topic definition material is missing.
Registration assurance is missing.
Topic environment status is missing.
Specialized topic-team material is missing.
Agent Workspace setup is in scope and evidence is missing.

requires: Agent Workspace evidence or explicit workspace blocker when in scope
Current Topic Actor roster and Topic Actor Workspace refs when present
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when missing predecessor evidence can be produced by the canonical flow.
mutation_notes: Reads and reports static readiness; does not launch or materialize profile material.
unrecoverable_blockers: Claimed readiness lacks delegated service evidence.
Agent Workspace evidence is stale or uses legacy support roots.

predecessors.condition: topic_team_validation_status is missing.
Registration assurance is missing from validation context.

requires: Reused common preparation refs and current Topic Actor refs when present
produces: Current Topic Actor roster and Topic Actor Workspace refs preserved in the summary
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when validation can run first.
mutation_notes: Writes or updates isomer-topic-summary.md in the registered Topic Workspace.
unrecoverable_blockers: Only a provisional topic workspace seed exists.
Validation cannot produce authoritative topic refs or explicit blockers.

predecessors.condition: Reviewable final summary or draft profile evidence is missing.
Draft profile or packet/profile input summary is missing.

requires: Draft profile or packet/profile input summary
Packet validation output or explicit validation blocker
recovery_conditions: Recoverable when reviewable material can be prepared first.
mutation_notes: Records explicit approval, rejection, or blocked approval provenance.
unrecoverable_blockers: Approval cannot be implied.
Reviewable material remains blocked.

predecessors.condition: Approval provenance is missing.
Registration assurance is missing or blocked.
isomer-topic-summary.md is missing.

requires: Approved Topic Team Instantiation Packet or packet/profile input summary
produces: Materialized Topic Agent Team Profile Bundle
recovery_conditions: Recoverable only up to explicit approval; materialization must wait for captured approval provenance.
mutation_notes: Writes approved static profile bundle under the selected Topic Workspace.
unrecoverable_blockers: Approval provenance is missing or withheld.
Registration assurance is blocked.

edges.condition: A new or unclear topic needs a workspace seed before source topic overview can be written.
Topic overview exists but has open questions that block downstream work.
Registration needs concrete topic material.
Clarification resolves missing or generic topic statement before registration.
Registered topic and workspace context are needed before setup intent feeds service delegation.
Topic setup needs a user-editable topic env source intent or equivalent explicit target spec.
The normal specialization path prepares topic env predecessor evidence before adapting team material when setup is in scope.
Team clarification requires copied specialization outputs.
Agent env source intent needs authoritative Agent Names or topic-team scope.
Per-agent cwd requirements may depend on topic env predecessor evidence.
Agent Workspace setup needs source agent env intent when cwd readiness proof is requested.
Agent Workspace setup needs Topic Main Development Repository and projection predecessor evidence.
Agent Workspace setup needs specialized topic-team shape and authoritative Agent Names.
Validation consumes Agent Workspace setup evidence when workspaces are in scope.
Validation consumes topic environment setup evidence or explicit setup blockers.
Validation consumes specialized topic-team material.
Finalization summarizes validation status and blockers.
Approval needs reviewable final topic-team material.
Materialization requires explicit approval provenance.
Materialization references the final topic-team summary.
